sipoc.Input: [Query DB for parts available for replacement, consider IGBT module as well. Additional data points: frequency of cooling fan replacements, previous issues related to fans on similar machines]
sipoc.Process: Review recommended part for quality and fitment compatibility; order new cooling fan from Parts Manufacturer, Inc.; inspect the installation process.
sipoc.Output: [Log entry updated with equipment replacement, feedback from supplier. Logs showing replacement parts installed properly.]

title: Monitor and Analyze IGBT Module Performance

sipoc.Input: [Log data from production line showing failure patterns]
sipoc.Process: Analyze historical performance trends and current machine parameters; identify if there is a correlation with recent equipment changes or maintenance practices.
sipoc.Output: [Update the database with real-time monitoring log entries. Logs indicating no significant changes in IGBT module failure rates since last update.]

sipoc.Input: [Log data from production line showing machine performance metrics; parameters such as temperature and vibration recorded before the incident]
sipoc.Process: Review log entries for operational conditions leading up to failure; adjust process settings if necessary to ensure that no new factors have contributed to the failures.
sipoc.Output: [Update database with adjusted parameters. System states updated after adjustment, showing improved performance metrics.]

sipoc.Input: [Log data from multiple sources: production line recordings, operator reports, database entries]
sipoc.Process: Automatically analyze the log files and production records for patterns that may suggest a potential cause of failure; this could involve pattern recognition algorithms or statistical analysis.
sipoc.Output: [Generate detailed report on RCA findings. Logs updated to indicate ongoing investigation.]

sipoc.Input: [Log data showing power supply transients and cooling fan issues]
sipoc.Process: Inspect the production line for indications of vibration, temperature spikes, dust accumulation; conduct a quick walk-through inspection to identify contributing factors.
sipoc.Output: [Record findings in log entries. Logs updated with observations.]

sipoc.Input: [Log entries from the incident and previous occurrences]
sipoc.Process: Prepare detailed log records; ensure that all necessary equipment parameters and performance metrics are saved for further analysis.
sipoc.Output: [Update database with RCA logs. Logs updated to indicate upcoming RCA.]

sipoc.Input: [Logs and reports compiled by previous tasks]
sipoc.Process: Automatically perform a comprehensive analysis of the RCA findings; this may involve integrating insights from multiple sources.
sipoc.Output: [Generate detailed RCA report. Logs updated with final results.]

title: Post-RCA Monitoring and Preventive Measures Implementation

sipoc.Process: Review and implement the recommended preventive measures; this includes retesting of components like cooling fans and IGBT modules.
sipoc.Output: [Log entry updated to reflect actions taken. Logs indicating implementation of corrective actions.]

title: Update Log Records with Action Plan Completion Status

sipoc.Process: Update the log records to reflect that the action plan has been completed; this ensures accountability for the task.
sipoc.Output: [Log entry updated to show completion status. Logs indicating resolution tasks are no longer pending.]

sipoc.Input: [Log data from previous incidents and RCA findings]
